Feel free to push to the bot's branch to update this PR if needed. 2. The bot will almost always only open one PR per version. 3. The bot will stop issuing PRs if more than 3 version bump PRs generated by the bot are open. If you don't want to package a particular version please close the PR. 4. If you want these PRs to be merged automatically, make an issue with @conda-forge-admin,`please add bot automerge` in the title and merge the resulting PR. This command will add our bot automerge feature to your feedstock. 5. If this PR was opened in error or needs to be updated please add the `bot-rerun` label to this PR. The bot will close this PR and schedule another one. If you do not have permissions to add this label, you can use the phrase @conda-forge-admin, please rerun bot in a PR comment to have the `conda-forge-admin` add it for you. Dependency Analysis -------------------- Please note that this analysis is **highly experimental**. The aim here is to make maintenance easier by inspecting the package's dependencies. Importantly this analysis does not support optional dependencies, please double check those before making changes. If you do not want hinting of this kind ever please add `bot: inspection: disabled` to your `conda-forge.yml`. If you encounter issues with this feature please ping the bot team `conda-forge/bot`. Analysis by source code inspection+grayskull shows **no discrepancy** with the stated requirements in the meta.yaml. Looking at the configuration seems the pytest is installed via the `text` extra here https://github.com/maxnoe/astropy/blob/remove_pypi_filter/tox.ini#LL113, so it's expected that `tests` env will not have pytest 🤔 

```ini
~/git/github/astropy on  remove_pypi_filter [!]
❯ tox c -e tests -k extras
[testenv:tests]
extras =
~/git/github/astropy on  remove_pypi_filter [!]
❯ tox c -e test -k extras
[testenv:test]
extras = test
```","created_at":"2022-12-08T15:36:52Z","updated_at":"2022-12-08T15:36:53Z","html_url":"https://github.com/astropy/astropy/pull/14139#discussion_r1043498980","pull_request_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/astropy/astropy/pulls/14139","author_association":"NONE","_links":{"self":{"href":"https://api.github.com/repos/astropy/astropy/pulls/comments/1043498980"},"html":{"href":"https://github.com/astropy/astropy/pull/14139#discussion_r1043498980"},"pull_request":{"href":"https://api.github.com/repos/astropy/astropy/pulls/14139"}},"reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/astropy/astropy/pulls/comments/1043498980/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"start_line":null,"original_start_line":null,"start_side":null,"line":27,"original_line":27,"side":"RIGHT","in_reply_to_id":1042615236},"pull_request":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/astropy/astropy/pulls/14139","id":1152207720,"node_id":"PR_kwDOAB_CCc5ErUto","html_url":"https://github.com/astropy/astropy/pull/14139","diff_url":"https://github.com/astropy/astropy/pull/14139.diff","patch_url":"https://github.com/astropy/astropy/pull/14139.patch","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/astropy/astropy/issues/14139","number":14139,"state":"open","locked":false,"title":"Tox
